title: Assistant Store Manager - Lulu Hypermarket India Advisory Limited - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Lulu Hypermarket India Advisory Limited - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Lulu Hypermarket India Advisory Limited! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Gurgaon team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Lulu Hypermarket India Advisory Limited:
Lulu Hypermarket India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lulu Hypermarket India Advisory Limited!
